problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
